metadata.project_name: Commercial Project Figure Q2 - Standard Floor Review Model 0.11
notes: 0.11 uses standard floor templates instead of expanding every office level.
This reduces JSON/Revit import load and matches engineering drawing practice.
Dimensions are visible in sections and DXF labels but remain seed sizes pending analysis.

coordinate_system.grid_reference_basis: Lower-left corner of normalized podium envelope; tower footprint uses same X origin and 20m normalized depth.

uncertainty.reason: 3-31F office floors are represented as one standard floor template to avoid repeated JSON/Revit geometry.
uncertainty.fallback_assumption: Expand only when analysis/export requires individual floors.

uncertainty.reason: 15m office spans preserve no-column office intent but require formal span/depth, deflection and vibration checks.
uncertainty.fallback_assumption: Consider PT/composite/deeper beam or approved vertical supports if office planning allows.

uncertainty.reason: Slab supported by core walls does not require duplicate beam along same wall line except for transfer/opening edge cases.
uncertainty.fallback_assumption: Keep wall as primary support line in review model.

keepouts.reason: No column is allowed at entrance lobby.
No column is allowed at atrium. Opening edge beams provided.
3m clear passageway at 1/F linking proposed footbridge.
No column/wall within proposed offices; long-span beams/PT/composite framing require formal check.

represents: 3/F-31/F office standard floors except special sky/refuge variant if separated

analysis_options.name: revit_import_mode
analysis_options.value: standard-floor-review-only; do not expand repeated office levels during review import

issues.message: Review-grade only; formal structural analysis not completed.
3-31F office floors are represented by one standard floor template to reduce repeated geometry and Revit import time.
Core-wall-supported slab zones intentionally omit duplicate wall-line beams except at transfer/opening edge conditions.
Opening perimeter beams are included around atrium and skylight openings.
15m office long-span beams preserve no-column office intent but require formal span/depth, deflection and vibration checks.
Displayed member dimensions are seed sizes pending formal design.
